text:
✅ **PR #6 merged** — squashed into `main`, branch `feat/docs-generator-skill` deleted.

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| State | **MERGED** |
| Merge commit | `e7967d2` |
| Merged at | 2026-07-03 22:53 UTC |
| Method | squash + delete-branch |

The `aish/docs-generator` skill + two-repo harvester is now on `main`. No CI checks configured, so nothing to gate. Skill remains installed at `~/.aish/skills/aish/docs-generator/` and usable now — run its Steps 3–4 when you want to regenerate pages and land the `0.18.5 → 0.29.3` version reconciliation.
